title: Surface AI fallback reason and deterministic mode in UI
owner: Frontend UX Agent + Safety/AI Boundary Agent
objective: Make AI-disabled, unavailable, rate-limited, timeout, and invalid-output fallback states clear to analysts without implying failure of the workflow.
constraints: Do not change fallback contract unless needed
acceptance_criteria: AI-off mode displays deterministic-mode notice
Provider failure / invalid output displays fallback notice
Dashboard and handoff flows still work when AI is disabled
Tests or manual smoke notes cover at least AI-off and invalid-output fallback
validation: manual: run main sample path with AI off
stop_conditions: Need to change API response shape beyond UI consumption

title: Add privacy regression tests for no full-row LLM transmission
objective: Ensure recommendation and copilot contexts cannot include full uploaded row payloads.
constraints: Reject raw row/data arrays in handoff routes
acceptance_criteria: Tests assert profile payload includes only capped metadata/sample values
Tests reject obvious raw row fields in copilot handoff route
No route accepts `rows`, `data`, or full dataset payload for AI contexts
stop_conditions: Current API intentionally accepts a raw row field; request owner review before changing contract

title: Guarantee caveat parity across dashboard, PDF, and handoff JSON
objective: Ensure readiness caveats and review-only language carry into all export surfaces.
constraints: Do not make export sound like approval
acceptance_criteria: Decision handoff JSON includes readiness status, caveats, review notice, AI mode
PDF includes decision readiness and caveats
Unsafe status includes review-only language
Tests cover unsafe packet and PDF quality lines
validation: manual: export from risky quality sample
stop_conditions: PDF library cannot support requested accessibility content without new dependency

title: Strengthen unsafe readiness and data-quality regression tests
objective: Ensure risky quality sample and missing evidence do not appear action-ready.
acceptance_criteria: Negative counts and >100 percentages are warning/fail as appropriate
Missing admin/evidence fields downgrade readiness
Readiness remains deterministic
Tests cover missing evidence and risky quality sample
stop_conditions: Business rule thresholds are ambiguous and materially affect readiness

title: Create client-side dashboard project kit export
objective: Improve second-pass handoff by exporting prepared CSV, handoff JSON, transformation log, schema/config JSON, and README text.
acceptance_criteria: Project kit can be downloaded from export step
Kit includes README text with caveats and review requirements
Prepared data export preserves formula neutralization
Tests cover project kit JSON structure
stop_conditions: Zip dependency needed; request approval before adding dependency

title: Add one additional decision template with synthetic sample data
owner: Product/Safety Agent + Backend Pipeline Agent + Docs Agent
objective: Demonstrate reusable template pattern without broad platform expansion.
acceptance_criteria: Template appears in selector
Suggested collection fields reflect new decision
Evidence coverage and readiness checks work
Demo sample loads and completes profile/harmonization path
Docs explain scope and caveats
stop_conditions: Template requires new architecture or persistence

title: Accessibility baseline for workflow and chart outputs
objective: Improve non-technical and accessibility readiness without rewriting UI architecture.
acceptance_criteria: Buttons/inputs/alerts have accessible labels
Charts include screenReaderSummary where recommended
Manual keyboard smoke test documented
Unit tests validate chart summaries where feasible
validation: manual: keyboard navigation and screen-reader spot check
stop_conditions: Accessibility tooling dependency requested; owner approval needed

title: Create repo-local final handoff docs
objective: Add concise handoff docs to the repository after owner approval.
constraints: No test-passed claims unless evidence provided
acceptance_criteria: Docs distinguish implemented, claimed, aspirational, and out-of-scope
Docs include safety and privacy boundaries
Docs include validation commands and review gates
Docs link to demo script and codex prompts
validation: npm run lint if markdown/type checks apply
stop_conditions: Docs conflict with current code behavior; ask owner to verify
